---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for improving JITCR
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement

---

## ⚠️ Before You Post

**Feature ideas belong in [Discussions → Ideas (Feature Requests)](https://github.com/intenogent/jitcr-protocol/discussions/categories/ideas-feature-requests)**, not Issues.

Why? Because:
- Ideas need discussion and feedback before code
- Discussions are better suited for brainstorming
- Issues are for confirmed bugs and concrete problems

**Please post there instead.** 👆

---

## If You Still Want to Open This Issue

If you have a specific, actionable feature request, fill out below:

### Description
What feature would you like to see? Be specific.

### Use Case
When or why would you need this? What problem does it solve?

### Proposed Solution
How should it work? What would the user experience be?

### Alternatives
Have you found any workarounds or ways to accomplish this now?

### Additional Context
Screenshots, examples, or other details that help explain the request?

---

**Remember:** Discussion in [Discussions → Ideas](https://github.com/intenogent/jitcr-protocol/discussions/categories/ideas-feature-requests) is almost always better than Issues for feature requests. Thanks!
